case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. vs. MASSIMILLO, FRANK

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT MASSIMILLO, FRANK
NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION, WRIT MAY BE ISSUED ON 4/20/01, IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MASSIMILLO, FRANK $2,381.47 PRINCIPAL, $1,911.81 INTEREST, $23.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,316.28, THIS IS RENEWAL OF OLD CASE #053849. ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
